chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. C.P D-295 of 2024: Mukhtiar Begum vs. S.H.O. P.S. Kanga and others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Javed Ahmed Soomro, Advocate Date of hearing: 07.05.2024 Date of Order: 07.05.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner has invoked the writ jurisdiction of this court seeking possession of immovable property stated to be in the hands of private respondents. Upon query as to how a possible suit for restoration inter se private parties could be couched as a writ petition, learned counsel had no response. The petition also seeks protection, however, such a plea is prima facie barred by the judgment of this Court reported as PLD 2019 Sindh 168. Therefore, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed, along with pending applications, in limine. Judge Judge
